description: A sports league is negotiating the sale of its broadcast rights for the next five years. An agent must analyze two competing offers.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the detailed offers from both competing broadcasters.

expected_outcome.value: Agent has the structured data for both offers, including guaranteed payments and revenue sharing models.

nodes.task_description: Model the projected total value of each offer over the five-year term, including the variable revenue sharing component.

expected_outcome.value: The model shows that Offer B has a higher potential value despite a lower upfront guarantee.

nodes.task_description: Generate a comparison report for the league executive, recommending Offer B.

expected_outcome.value: Agent produces a clear report comparing the two offers and justifying the recommendation.
